title: Savory Flaky Mexican Manchego Quesadilla
description: A cultured, flaky, brunch-mood Mexican dish featuring Manchego cheese, perfect for a satisfying meal. This recipe is nut-free-friendly and served in a ramekin.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the shredded Manchego cheese, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Place a large tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle one-quarter of the cheese mixture onto half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the cheese.
Place the tortilla in a ramekin and repeat the process with the remaining tortillas and cheese mixture.
Dot the top of each tortilla with the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
Bake the quesadillas in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
